tasks.label: athena-lifecycle-checks
tasks.command: cd /Users/phillipcaswell/Documents/GitHub/IMS_Rubric && echo "FILE CREATED:" && ls -la ATHENA_INFORMATION_LIFECYCLE.md && echo "" && echo "LINE COUNT:" && wc -l ATHENA_INFORMATION_LIFECYCLE.md && echo "" && echo "HEADING OUTLINE:" && grep -nE '^(#|##|###|####) ' ATHENA_INFORMATION_LIFECYCLE.md && echo "" && echo "TRANSITION CHECKS:" && grep -n "Stage 2 → Stage 3" ATHENA_INFORMATION_LIFECYCLE.md && grep -n "Stage 2 → Stage 4" ATHENA_INFORMATION_LIFECYCLE.md && grep -n "Governed Acceptance" ATHENA_INFORMATION_LIFECYCLE.md && echo "" && echo "FINAL SENTENCE:" && tail -n 1 ATHENA_INFORMATION_LIFECYCLE.md && echo "" && echo "GIT STATUS:" && git status --short
